My ideas and then how it turns on the back end, you know, aren't always 100% aligned.
Yeah, yeah.
That makes sense totally.
Yeah.
Okay.
Cool.

No, I think I sorted most of them out yesterday.
Teandra was really helping me with that stuff.

I will 100% let you know.
I don't want to put things on your website where I feel like I might screw something up.
Yeah, yeah.
Just, like, Nithin takes care of the website, so whenever you have any questions related to Webflow that, like, you are not able to figure it out, just, like, being Nithin any time.
Perfect, perfect.
I kept it pretty conservative yesterday, just trying to make sure I published things and got them out there correctly.
And then over the next couple of weeks, I'll really...
Think about the images and sorting that stuff out and enriching the content, basically.
Next chat.
Tanmay, I'll bring to the Sprint team as well, if there's something we can automate there.
Like, there's some ideas.
I think that, like, even that process I've verbally outlined and built at scale.
So, yeah.
Makes sense.
And I think, do you want to talk about that program at ESUS?
Or I think, like, the plan is there.
We can start it once we have the platform, right?
Yeah.
Let's wait on the strategy sprint.
George will send that over.
And I think we'll talk about that execution when I've seen the deeper, like, plan that they have there and how we execute against.
Yeah.
I'd say let's save that for next week with just waiting, like, understanding that fully on that team and what.
So, I don't know the dev side.
Yeah.
So.
I understand that.
Yeah.
Like, I have hear us previously, but, like, yeah.
Like, you know, like, we can create, but, like, still, like.
know, know, like, know,
You have, you are already building the platform and I think we can use this Atlas to make sure that, yeah.
For sure.
Okay.
Cool.

No, I think we are good, yeah.
Awesome.
Yeah, and Nemir said it and you've already started, this team is super responsive and everything.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Airbyte and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, workflows, and optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/5EdvvgnEJHxu7M6cZkbYi5Vh2VjgSHXT?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New product demo by Marcel; implementation of workflows coming soon](https://fathom.video/share/5EdvvgnEJHxu7M6cZkbYi5Vh2VjgSHXT?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)
  - [Content strategy focusing on competitive comparisons, use cases, and how-to guides](https://fathom.video/share/5EdvvgnEJHxu7M6cZkbYi5Vh2VjgSHXT?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)
  - [Emphasis on improving content quality, including adding comparison tables and visuals](https://fathom.video/share/5EdvvgnEJHxu7M6cZkbYi5Vh2VjgSHXT?tab=summary&timestamp=1270.0)
  - [Discussion on linking practices and SEO strategies for competitor-related content](https://fathom.video/share/5EdvvgnEJHxu7M6cZkbYi5Vh2VjgSHXT?tab=summary&timestamp=529.0)

## Topics

### Product Updates and Workflow Implementation

  - [Marcel demonstrated new product; full implementation of workflows upcoming](https://fathom.video/share/5EdvvgnEJHxu7M6cZkbYi5Vh2VjgSHXT?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)
  - [Atlas (replacing Air Ops) expected to streamline content processes and resolve recurring issues](https://fathom.video/share/5EdvvgnEJHxu7M6cZkbYi5Vh2VjgSHXT?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)
  - [Strategy sprint kickoff will provide direction for new content workflows and quality improvements](https://fathom.video/share/5EdvvgnEJHxu7M6cZkbYi5Vh2VjgSHXT?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)

### Content Strategy and Optimization

  - [Focus on creating bottom-of-funnel (BOFU) intent content](https://fathom.video/share/5EdvvgnEJHxu7M6cZkbYi5Vh2VjgSHXT?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)
  - [Expanding content to cover various use cases and workflow automation tools](https://fathom.video/share/5EdvvgnEJHxu7M6cZkbYi5Vh2VjgSHXT?tab=summary&timestamp=350.0)
  - [Competitive content strategy:](https://fathom.video/share/5EdvvgnEJHxu7M6cZkbYi5Vh2VjgSHXT?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)
      - [Software lists (e.g., "best ETL software")](https://fathom.video/share/5EdvvgnEJHxu7M6cZkbYi5Vh2VjgSHXT?tab=summary&timestamp=461.0)
      - [Alternatives pages for competitors and adjacent products](https://fathom.video/share/5EdvvgnEJHxu7M6cZkbYi5Vh2VjgSHXT?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)
      - ["Versus" pages for known competitors with search volume](https://fathom.video/share/5EdvvgnEJHxu7M6cZkbYi5Vh2VjgSHXT?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)
      - ["What is \[Competitor\]" articles for direct competitors](https://fathom.video/share/5EdvvgnEJHxu7M6cZkbYi5Vh2VjgSHXT?tab=summary&timestamp=529.0)

### Content Structure and Visuals

  - [Adding comparison tables at the top of listicles for better visibility and citations](https://fathom.video/share/5EdvvgnEJHxu7M6cZkbYi5Vh2VjgSHXT?tab=summary&timestamp=1396.0)
  - [Incorporating pros and cons for each tool in comparison articles](https://fathom.video/share/5EdvvgnEJHxu7M6cZkbYi5Vh2VjgSHXT?tab=summary&timestamp=1402.0)
  - [Suggestion to include more in-article visuals and infographics (using AI tools and brand guidelines)](https://fathom.video/share/5EdvvgnEJHxu7M6cZkbYi5Vh2VjgSHXT?tab=summary&timestamp=1277.0)
  - [Emphasis on creating custom images to enhance content quality](https://fathom.video/share/5EdvvgnEJHxu7M6cZkbYi5Vh2VjgSHXT?tab=summary&timestamp=1909.0)

### SEO and Linking Practices

  - [Discussion on whether to link to competitor homepages in "What is \[Competitor\]" articles](https://fathom.video/share/5EdvvgnEJHxu7M6cZkbYi5Vh2VjgSHXT?tab=summary&timestamp=529.0)
  - [Airbyte team prefers not to link directly to competitors to avoid passing "link juice"](https://fathom.video/share/5EdvvgnEJHxu7M6cZkbYi5Vh2VjgSHXT?tab=summary&timestamp=1092.0)
  - [Consideration of A/B testing linking practices on less critical articles](https://fathom.video/share/5EdvvgnEJHxu7M6cZkbYi5Vh2VjgSHXT?tab=summary&timestamp=1154.0)

### Tools and Analytics

  - [GrowthX developing optimization tools and building best practices into Atlas](https://fathom.video/share/5EdvvgnEJHxu7M6cZkbYi5Vh2VjgSHXT?tab=summary&timestamp=1846.0)
  - [Airbyte using Profound for SEO analysis; offer to share insights with GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/5EdvvgnEJHxu7M6cZkbYi5Vh2VjgSHXT?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)

## Next Steps

  - [George to send over strategy sprint outcomes and execution plan](https://fathom.video/share/5EdvvgnEJHxu7M6cZkbYi5Vh2VjgSHXT?tab=summary&timestamp=363.0)
  - [Implement comparison tables and pros/cons sections in listicles and alternatives articles](https://fathom.video/share/5EdvvgnEJHxu7M6cZkbYi5Vh2VjgSHXT?tab=summary&timestamp=1402.0)
  - [Explore creation of custom visuals and infographics for articles](https://fathom.video/share/5EdvvgnEJHxu7M6cZkbYi5Vh2VjgSHXT?tab=summary&timestamp=1909.0)
  - [GrowthX to triple-check existing Airbyte content to avoid duplication in keyword research](https://fathom.video/share/5EdvvgnEJHxu7M6cZkbYi5Vh2VjgSHXT?tab=summary&timestamp=436.0)
  - [Nemanja to focus on enriching content with visuals and improved structure](https://fathom.video/share/5EdvvgnEJHxu7M6cZkbYi5Vh2VjgSHXT?tab=summary&timestamp=2002.0)
  - [Continue discussion on ESUS program implementation once the platform is ready](https://fathom.video/share/5EdvvgnEJHxu7M6cZkbYi5Vh2VjgSHXT?tab=summary&timestamp=2059.0)

action_items.description: Share Airbyte brand guidelines w/ Nemanja for creating article images
Add pros/cons sections to existing listicle articles. Include comparison table at top. Emphasize Airbyte pros, minimize cons.
Export relevant ProFound analysis, share w/ Jakub's team
Send WhatFix article w/ good visuals to Nemanja as example
